'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=8HCaMeFWfxxAg8Jy2bM13Izc3ChKBo26lB9sFao9aho-1774194314-1.0.1.1-oyZ9gEfu43Y2C2ZjVw1iGA1qcYlyb9G2LhXELi73F9s"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
